title: Melty Golden Canadian Cheese Casserole
description: A comforting Canadian dish featuring a blend of cheeses and turmeric powder, cooked in a cataplana vessel, suitable for plant-based diets when using vegan cheese alternatives.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Roll out the long fermentation dough to a thickness of about 1/4 inch.
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and saute the chopped onion until translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
In a large bowl, combine the sauteed onion and garlic, turmeric powder, salt, and black pepper.
Stir in the vegan mozzarella shreds until well combined.
Place the dough into a cataplana vessel, trimming any excess dough from the edges.
Fill the dough-lined vessel with the cheese and onion mixture.
Fold the excess dough over the filling, pressing the edges to seal.
Bake the casserole in the preheated oven for 35 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown.
